attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SDH.DCA_ID, 
SDH.ORACLE_REASON_CODE,
SDH.SALESREP_NAME,
SDH.COMMENTS,
SDH.JUSTIFICATION,
SDH.DCA_STATUS,
SDH.DCA_APPROVED_BY,
SDH.PROXY_APPROVER,
SDH.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SDH.CREATED_BY,
SDH.CREATED_DATE,
SDH.UPDATED_BY,
SDH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SDH.SAF_INTERFACE_DATE,
SDH.GROUP_ID,
SDH.BATCH_ID,
SDH.CREATE_DATETIME,
SDH.ACTION_CODE,
'RI'
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_HEADER SDH
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTI_CLAIM_GROUP_STATUS NDCGS
WHERE NDCGS.BK_DISTI_CLAIM_GROUP_STATUS_CD =SDH.DCA_STATUS)

SELECT 
SDH.DCA_ID	        AS BK_DISTI_CLAIM_GROUP_ID_INT, 
SDH.SALESREP_NAME	AS SALES_REP_NAME, 
SDH.GROUP_ID		AS CLAIM_GROUP_ID_INT,
SDH.SAF_INTERFACE_DATE	AS AR_SYSTEM_INTERFACE_DTM, 
SDH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE	AS SOURCE_LAST_UPDATED_DTM, 
SDH.CREATED_DATE	AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
CASE 
	WHEN SDH.ACTIVE_FLAG='Y' THEN 'N'
	WHEN SDH.ACTIVE_FLAG='N' THEN 'Y'
END AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,  
SDH.UPDATED_BY		AS UPDATED_BY_USER,
SDH.CREATED_BY		AS CREATED_BY_USER,
SDH.PROXY_APPROVER	AS CLAIM_GRP_APRVD_PRXY_RPRTD_USR,
SDH.DCA_APPROVED_BY	AS CLAIM_GRP_APRVD_BY_RPRTD_USR , 									
SDH.JUSTIFICATION	AS JUSTIFICATION_CMT, 
SDH.COMMENTS		AS APPROVER_CMT, 
SDH.ORACLE_REASON_CODE 			 AS REASON_CD, 
SDH.DCA_STATUS		AS BK_DISTI_CLAIM_GROUP_STATUS_CD, 
NCWP_APRV.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY AS CLAIM_GRP_APRVD_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
NCWP_PROX.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY AS CLAIM_GRP_APRVD_PROXY_PRTY_KEY,
NCWP_CRTD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY AS CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
NCWP_UPDT.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY AS UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 			 AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER							 AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)			 AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER							 AS EDW_UPDATE_USER	
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_HEADER SDH

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTI_CLAIM_GROUP_STATUS NDCG
ON NDCG.BK_DISTI_CLAIM_GROUP_STATUS_CD=SDH.DCA_STATUS

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_APRV
ON SDH.DCA_APPROVED_BY=NCWP_APRV.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
AND SDH.DCA_APPROVED_BY IS NOT NULL

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_PROX
ON SDH.PROXY_APPROVER=NCWP_PROX.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
AND SDH.PROXY_APPROVER IS NOT NULL

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_CRTD
ON SDH.CREATED_BY=NCWP_CRTD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
AND SDH.CREATED_BY IS NOT NULL

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_UPDT
ON SDH.UPDATED_BY=NCWP_UPDT.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
AND SDH.UPDATED_BY IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
EDH.DCA_ID, 
EDH.ORACLE_REASON_CODE,
EDH.SALESREP_NAME,
EDH.COMMENTS,
EDH.JUSTIFICATION,
EDH.DCA_STATUS,
EDH.DCA_APPROVED_BY,
EDH.PROXY_APPROVER,
EDH.ACTIVE_FLAG,
EDH.CREATED_BY,
EDH.CREATED_DATE,
EDH.UPDATED_BY,
EDH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
EDH.SAF_INTERFACE_DATE,
EDH.GROUP_ID,
EDH.BATCH_ID,
EDH.CREATE_DATETIME,
EDH.ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DCA_HEADER EDH
